title: OptiMobile (Fabric)
description: A mod pack for mobile Java Edition players on Amethyst Launcher!
body:
![optimobilebanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4de71735c618e88ebe922facfd8179a379cc1cd7.png)
# What is this for?
  OptiMobile was made for mobile Java players on a launcher called Amethyst or Zalith Launcher.  This mod pack allows you to use Sodium which is a performance enhancing mod to help with performance.  This pack also has compatible shaders that work, but this does not mean every device can handle all shaders.  The SHADER I recommend for most devices is Makeup Lite, it will give you just enough shaders and run decent even on a low end device.  Sodium DOES NOT make your phone run better either it's a mod that is supposed to help with boosting performance, so don't expect it to fix a potato device.
# Help it's not loading?
  Sodium developers and Amethyst developers have had it out in the past.  So don't ask for Sodium help on Discord in either servers.  This mod pack was made to help you get the mods I KNOW and have TESTED working on your phone.  I even tested this pack on a low spec device and it works just fine.
# Help 1.16.5 isn't working?
  1.16.5 requires either Zink or Krypton Wrapper Renderer to work with Soidum.  Only Zink allows for some shaders to work as well.
# Will there be other versions?
  Yes, but for now I released this only for the latest version of Minecraft until I gather other versions.
# Why doesn't it have Zoomify?
  OptiMobile latest versions because so many requested this, has Zoomify now!  Disable or delete it if you don't want it as it doesn't affect performance I just wanted this pack to be mostly performance based for mobile.
# Does this pack have shaders?
  Yes, I added shaders that are compatible and optimized for mobile including settings, not all versions have shader support though due to many reasons.  If you want to add shaders you can do so yourself and test.
# The mod pack crashes?
  Make sure you're using the correct renderer, Sodium requires you to use LTW or Mobile Glues so learn how to set-up you launcher properly and it WILL NOT crash.
# Can I add other mods?
  Sure you can, just download OptiMobile and add other mods not currently in the pack.  I wanted this pack to be mostly optimized mods for mobile without the extra stuff that isn't even performance related.
# Does this work on PC?
  Of course it does, now you could add other mods on PC like C2ME/Chunky/DH and experience somethign else entirely when it comes to performance.  However those mods don't fully work on mobile so I didn't add them to this pack.

# Example Of FPS Boost

**Device Used In Screenshot**
- Anbernic RG557
- Dimensity D8300
- 12GB Ram
- Mali G615 GPU
The first image is the same save, with no mods, same video configuration set minus all of the performance mods.  The second image is with OptiMobile which boosts performance 150+ extra fps which I know isnt a lot but it's also more stable.
![No Mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f9d0365621b2f2052b3f00e1fff5c04a3180680.jpeg)
![OptiMobile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/289409aa18dac1cf57c0ff3439d1dd15d9397d84.jpeg)
